series.title: 초보기사 분투기
series.author: 해광 화물운송
series.summary: 막막했던 첫 운행부터 정산의 보람까지. 새벽을 달리는 초보 화물기사의 좌충우돌 성장기. 25~70세, 초보·고령 모두 환영하는 진짜 화물 이야기.
series.poster: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><linearGradient id='pg' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#1a3a8a'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0c1628'/></linearGradient><linearGradient id='ps' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ff9e5e'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#ffd28a'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='300' height='400' fill='url(#pg)'/><rect y='250' width='300' height='150' fill='url(#ps)' opacity='.92'/><circle cx='150' cy='250' r='44' fill='#fff4cf' opacity='.95'/><polygon points='90,400 130,250 170,250 210,400' fill='#3a3a45'/><rect x='138' y='250' width='10' height='150' fill='#ffe27a'/><rect x='118' y='205' width='64' height='52' rx='6' fill='#1a3a8a'/><rect x='128' y='214' width='44' height='18' rx='3' fill='#9fb6e0'/><circle cx='132' cy='260' r='8' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='168' cy='260' r='8' fill='#1a1a1a'/><rect x='140' y='234' width='20' height='9' fill='#ffd700'/><text x='150' y='60' font-size='30' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>초보기사</text><text x='150' y='98' font-size='30' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>분투기</text><text x='150' y='130' font-size='13' fill='#cdd7ea' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>새벽을 달리는 사람들</text></svg>

episodes.title: 새벽을 달리는 사람들
episodes.thumb: <svg viewBox='0 0 160 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='160' height='160' fill='#14213d'/><circle cx='130' cy='34' r='18' fill='#fdf2c0' opacity='.3'/><text x='16' y='34' font-size='15' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>새벽 4:00</text><rect x='14' y='104' width='96' height='30' rx='6' fill='#3a4a6b'/><circle cx='40' cy='96' r='15' fill='#f0c89a'/><rect x='118' y='104' width='30' height='30' rx='6' fill='#ff5a4d'/><circle cx='133' cy='119' r='10' fill='#fff'/></svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷1. 남들 다 자는 새벽 4시, 오늘도 하루가 시작된다.
panels.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='520' height='300' fill='#14213d'/><circle cx='430' cy='60' r='30' fill='#fdf2c0' opacity='.25'/><text x='50' y='55' font-size='22' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">새벽 4:00</text><rect x='40' y='200' width='300' height='60' rx='10' fill='#3a4a6b'/><rect x='40' y='180' width='90' height='40' rx='10' fill='#cdd7ea'/><circle cx='95' cy='178' r='26' fill='#f0c89a'/><path d='M70 172 q25 -22 50 0' fill='#3a2a1a'/><rect x='370' y='200' width='80' height='60' rx='10' fill='#ff5a4d'/><circle cx='410' cy='230' r='22' fill='#fff'/><line x1='410' y1='230' x2='410' y2='215' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='410' y1='230' x2='422' y2='236' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='388' cy='192' r='9' fill='#ffb3ad'/><circle cx='432' cy='192' r='9' fill='#ffb3ad'/><text x='360' y='120' font-size='30' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">RRR~</text><rect x='150' y='70' width='180' height='56' rx='16' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='170,124 160,150 195,124' fill='#fff'/><text x='170' y='105' font-size='18' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">또 새벽이네…</text></svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷2. 텅 빈 고속도로, 노을을 마주 보며 달린다. 이 시간만큼은 온전히 내 것.
panels.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><linearGradient id='sky1' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ff9e5e'/><stop offset='60%' stop-color='#ffd28a'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#fff3d6'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#sky1)'/><circle cx='260' cy='120' r='48' fill='#fff4cf' opacity='.9'/><polygon points='180,300 230,150 290,150 340,300' fill='#4a4a55'/><rect x='252' y='150' width='16' height='150' fill='#ffe27a'/><rect x='225' y='120' width='70' height='55' rx='6' fill='#1a3a8a'/><rect x='235' y='130' width='50' height='20' rx='3' fill='#9fb6e0'/><circle cx='240' cy='178' r='9' fill='#222'/><circle cx='280' cy='178' r='9' fill='#222'/><rect x='248' y='150' width='24' height='10' fill='#ffd700'/><text x='300' y='60' font-size='16' fill='#7a4a10' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">— 오늘도 안전운전 —</text></svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷3. 휴게소 라면 한 그릇. 별거 아닌데, 이게 또 그렇게 든든하다.
panels.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='520' height='300' fill='#fbeede'/><rect x='0' y='210' width='520' height='90' fill='#d9b48f'/><ellipse cx='260' cy='220' rx='120' ry='34' fill='#c0392b'/><path d='M140 218 a120 30 0 0 0 240 0 z' fill='#e74c3c'/><ellipse cx='260' cy='212' rx='104' ry='24' fill='#f4c542'/><path d='M200 205 q20 -14 40 0 M250 208 q20 -14 40 0' stroke='#e0a500' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><path d='M225 175 q10 -18 0 -34' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='4' fill='none' opacity='.8'/><path d='M265 172 q12 -20 0 -38' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='4' fill='none' opacity='.8'/><path d='M300 176 q10 -18 0 -32' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='4' fill='none' opacity='.8'/><circle cx='430' cy='150' r='30' fill='#f0c89a'/><path d='M402 144 q28 -24 56 0' fill='#3a2a1a'/><path d='M418 158 q12 10 24 0' stroke='#7a5230' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='220' height='56' rx='16' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='330,92 360,118 345,92' fill='#fff'/><text x='168' y='76' font-size='18' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">크… 이 맛에 다니지!</text></svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷4. 정산 문자가 띵— 울린다. 힘들었지만, 이 보람에 또 핸들을 잡는다.
panels.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='520' height='300' fill='#eaf0fb'/><rect x='190' y='40' width='140' height='230' rx='20' fill='#222'/><rect x='200' y='60' width='120' height='190' rx='6' fill='#fff'/><rect x='210' y='80' width='100' height='40' rx='8' fill='#03C75A'/><text x='222' y='100' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">[정산 완료]</text><text x='222' y='114' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">이번 달 입금</text><rect x='210' y='130' width='100' height='34' rx='8' fill='#eef2fb'/><text x='224' y='152' font-size='15' fill='#1a3a8a' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">+ 척척척</text><circle cx='410' cy='150' r='34' fill='#f0c89a'/><path d='M378 142 q32 -26 64 0' fill='#3a2a1a'/><path d='M392 158 q18 16 36 0' stroke='#7a5230' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><circle cx='398' cy='148' r='3' fill='#333'/><circle cx='422' cy='148' r='3' fill='#333'/><text x='60' y='60' font-size='18' fill='#1a3a8a' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">띵—!</text><rect x='40' y='180' width='150' height='52' rx='16' fill='#fff' stroke='#dce3f2'/><text x='56' y='205' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">이번 달도</text><text x='56' y='224' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">수고했다, 나!</text></svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷5. "막막하지? 나도 그랬어. 화물구인구직 해광에서 시작했거든. 초보도 다 알려줘!"
panels.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='520' height='300' fill='#f3f6fc'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='34' fill='#f0c89a'/><path d='M88 114 q32 -26 64 0' fill='#222'/><circle cx='108' cy='118' r='3' fill='#333'/><circle cx='132' cy='118' r='3' fill='#333'/><path d='M104 132 q16 8 32 0' stroke='#7a5230' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='80' y='165' width='80' height='70' rx='12' fill='#5b8def'/><rect x='60' y='40' width='210' height='60' rx='16' fill='#fff' stroke='#dce3f2'/><text x='76' y='66' font-size='14' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">나도 화물 한번</text><text x='76' y='86' font-size='14' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">해볼까? 초본데…</text><circle cx='400' cy='120' r='34' fill='#f0c89a'/><path d='M368 114 q32 -26 64 0' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='388' cy='118' r='3' fill='#333'/><circle cx='412' cy='118' r='3' fill='#333'/><path d='M384 130 q16 14 32 0' stroke='#7a5230' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='360' y='165' width='80' height='70' rx='12' fill='#1a3a8a'/><rect x='250' y='200' width='230' height='74' rx='16' fill='#FFD700'/><text x='268' y='228' font-size='14' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">'화물구인구직 해광'에서</text><text x='268' y='248' font-size='14' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">찾아봐! 초보·고령도</text><text x='268' y='266' font-size='14' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family="sans-serif">환영이래 👍</text></svg>
